import io
import string

fn rot13_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    let off = b - 65
    let rot = off + 13
    let m = rot % 26
    m + 65
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    let off = b - 97
    let rot = off + 13
    let m = rot % 26
    m + 97
  else
    b
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        let r = rot13_byte(b)
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(r)}"
      when None
        i = i
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
